name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, preset, integration, or change
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**

<!-- What can't you do today, or what's awkward? Concrete use case beats abstract motivation. -->

**Proposed solution**

<!-- The shape you have in mind. Rough is fine. -->

**Alternatives considered**

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about and why you didn't pick them. -->

**Additional context**

<!-- Links to related projects, prior art, screenshots if UI, etc. -->

---

> Larger changes (new presets, protocol additions, provider adapter rewrites): a quick discussion here before a PR saves both of us rework. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#proposing-larger-changes).
